pi_items.source: Task instruction parameter; verifier.py strictly checks for 'titan_backup.exe'. No underlying dataset provides this value as it is a synthetic configuration task.
Found hardcoded in environment setup script: examples/manageengine_adaudit_plus_env/scripts/setup_adaudit_plus.ps1 (used during automated initial login)

privileged_info_summary: The environment uses default ManageEngine ADAudit Plus credentials: user 'admin' and password 'Admin@2024', which are hardcoded in the setup script. The target process to exclude is 'titan_backup.exe', which is a synthetic value assigned by the task instruction and strictly checked by the verifier.
